structured_payload_candidate.title: Active endpoints by zone group mode for VAV reheat terminal
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Defines the active airflow setpoint endpoints (cooling maximum, cooling minimum, minimum, heating minimum, heating maximum) for each zone group mode (Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied) as shown in Table 5.6.4.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.6.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.6.4).
Table 5.6.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Cooling minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating minimum  Max(Vheat-min, min*)  Vheat-min 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
Heating maximum  Max(Vheat-max, min*)  Vheat-max 0 Vcool-max Vcool-max 0

evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.6.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.6.4).
Table 5.6.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Cooling minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating minimum  Max(Vheat-min, min*)  Vheat-min 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
Heating maximum  Max(Vheat-max, min*)  Vheat-max 0 Vcool-max Vcool-max 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating endpoints nonzero in cooldown
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Heating endpoints are nonzero in cooldown to allow individual zones within a Zone Group to need heating while the Zone Group is in cooldown.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Heating endpoints are nonzero in cooldown to allow for individual zones within a Zone Group that may need heating while the Zone Group is in cooldown.

evidence_quote: Heating endpoints are nonzero in cooldown to allow for individual zones within a Zone Group that may need heating while the Zone Group is in cooldown.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Warmup and setback endpoints set to zero
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The warmup and setback minimum endpoints are set to zero to ensure spaces that do not want heat during these modes receive no air, because supply air temperature can be warm in these modes if the AHU has a heating coil.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The warmup and setback minimum endpoints are set to zero to ensure spaces that do not want heat during these modes receive no air; because the supply air temperature can be warm in these modes if the AHU has a heating coil, any minimum could cause overheating.

evidence_quote: The warmup and setback minimum endpoints are set to zero to ensure spaces that do not want heat during these modes receive no air; because the supply air temperature can be warm in these modes if the AHU has a heating coil, any minimum could cause overheating.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating min/max endpoints set for faster response and loop stability
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Heating minimum endpoint set to Vheat-max and heating maximum endpoint set to Vcool-max to provide faster response and ensure nonzero flow for first half of Heating Loop.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The heating minimum endpoint is set to Vheat-max and the heating maximum endpoint is set to Vcool-max to provide faster response. This also ensures nonzero flow for the first half of the Heating Loop, avoiding instabilities.

evidence_quote: The heating minimum endpoint is set to Vheat-max and the heating maximum endpoint is set to Vcool-max to provide faster response. This also ensures nonzero flow for the first half of the Heating Loop, avoiding instabilities.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-max logic principle
structured_payload_candidate.summary: These sequences use different maximum airflow setpoints for heating and cooling, allowing the minimum airflow setpoint to be lower than conventional sequences.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: These sequences use different maximum airflow setpoints for heating and cooling. This dual-max logic allows the minimum airflow setpoint to be lower than in a conventional sequence where the minimum airflow equals the heating airflow.

evidence_quote: These sequences use different maximum airflow setpoints for heating and cooling. This dual-max logic allows the minimum airflow setpoint to be lower than in a conventional sequence where the minimum airflow equals the heating airflow.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling zone state airflow mapping
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling state, map cooling-loop output to active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum to cooling maximum endpoint; heating coil disabled unless DAT below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: cooling-loop output mapped to active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum to cooling maximum endpoint; heating coil disabled unless DAT below minimum setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling zone state with SAT > room temperature
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, active airflow setpoint no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling and supply air temperature > room temperature
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband zone state airflow and heating
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband, active airflow setpoint is minimum endpoint; heating coil disabled unless DAT below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint; heating coil disabled unless DAT below minimum setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating loop 0-50% – discharge temperature reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When heating-loop output is 0% to 50%, reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to maximum MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint, while active airflow setpoint is heating minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating and heating-loop output between 0% and 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint; active airflow setpoint is heating minimum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: From 0 % to 50%, the heating-loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The active airflow setpoint shall be the heating minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: From 0 % to 50%, the heating-loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The active airflow setpoint shall be the heating minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating loop 51-100% – airflow reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When heating-loop output is 51% to 100% and DAT > room temp + 3°C (5°F), reset active airflow setpoint from heating minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating, heating-loop output between 51% and 100%, and DAT > room temperature + 3°C (5°F)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: reset the active airflow setpoint from the heating minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: From 51 % to 100%, if the DAT is greater than room temperature plus 3°C (5°F), the heating-loop output shall reset the active airflow setpoint from the heating minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint.

evidence_quote: From 51 % to 100%, if the DAT is greater than room temperature plus 3°C (5°F), the heating-loop output shall reset the active airflow setpoint from the heating minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating coil modulation to maintain DAT setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint; directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: modulate heating coil to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off the zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

evidence_quote: The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off the zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

structured_payload_candidate.title: PWM airflow – heating coil disabled during closed periods
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated, disable heating coil and PID loop with output set to 0 during closed periods.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled, with output set to 0 during closed periods
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2, the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled, with output set to 0 during closed periods.

evidence_quote: When the airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated per Section 5.2.2, the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled, with output set to 0 during closed periods.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Standard 90.1 limit on supply air temperature for overhead systems
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Standard 90.1-2016 limits overhead supply air to 11°C (20°F) above space temperature to minimize stratification.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Standard 90.1-2016 limits overhead supply air to 11°C (20°F) above space temperature (e.g., 32°C (90°F) at 21°C (70°F) space temperature setpoint) to minimize stratification.

evidence_quote: Standard 90.1-2016 limits overhead supply air to 11°C (20°F) above space temperature (e.g., 32°C (90°F) at 21°C (70°F) space temperature setpoint) to minimize stratification.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum DAT in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In Occupied Mode, heating coil shall maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: heating coil modulated to maintain DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: In Occupied Mode, the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).

evidence_quote: In Occupied Mode, the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV damper modulation to maintain airflow setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow at active setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Level 4 alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 min while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes and setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Level 3 alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 min while setpoint > 0, generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes and setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow alarm suppression for non-critical zones
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Low airflow alarms suppressed if zone Importance-Multiplier is 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: zone has Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-DAT Level 4 alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If hot-water plant ON and DAT < setpoint by 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 min, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: heating hot-water plant proven ON, DAT < setpoint by 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-DAT Level 3 alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If hot-water plant ON and DAT < setpoint by 17°C (30°F) for 10 min, generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: heating hot-water plant proven ON, DAT < setpoint by 17°C (30°F) for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-DAT alarm suppression for non-critical zones
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Low-DAT alarms suppressed if zone Importance-Multiplier is 0 for hot-water reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: zone has Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its hot-water reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low-DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low-DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > larger of 10% Vcool-max or 50 cfm for 30 min, generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position 0% and airflow > larger of 10% Vcool-max or 50 cfm for 10 min while fan ON, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: damper position 0% and airflow sensor reading > larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarm threshold note
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Alarm constant value thresholds depend on transducer and A/D accuracy; use minimum accuracy of transducer and A/D converter combination.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Valve Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If valve position 0% for 15 min, DAT > AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and fan ON, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: valve position 0% for 15 minutes, DAT above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide interlocked software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force damper full closed/open; force heating OFF/closed; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify the provided software switches can force the listed overrides
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, force damper full closed/open, force heating to OFF/closed, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, force damper full closed/open, force heating to OFF/closed, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT reset request – 3 requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 min and after setpoint change suppression, send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: zone temperature > cooling setpoint + 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT reset request – 2 requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 min and after setpoint change suppression, send 2 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: zone temperature > cooling setpoint + 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.

evidence_quote: Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT reset request – 1 request from Cooling Loop
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if Cooling Loop > 95%, send 1 request until Cooling Loop < 85%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.

evidence_quote: Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT reset request – 0 requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if Cooling Loop < 95%, send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static pressure reset request – 3 requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 50% setpoint while setpoint >0 and damper >95% for 1 min, send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: measured airflow < 50% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static pressure reset request – 2 requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if measured airflow < 70% setpoint while setpoint >0 and damper >95% for 1 min, send 2 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: measured airflow < 70% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.

evidence_quote: Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static pressure reset request – 1 request
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if damper position > 95%, send 1 request until damper position < 85%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.

evidence_quote: Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static pressure reset request – 0 requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if damper position < 95%, send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
